---
name: Roadmap Item
about: Create a new roadmap entry for a Livepeer product or protocol initiative.
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**Goal:**  
_Describe the primary goal or objective of this roadmap item._  
Example: Improve Explorer stability and performance.

**Requirements:**  
_Outline the key requirements, deliverables, or success criteria for this initiative._  
Example: Fund a small backend team via the [RFP process](https://forum.livepeer.org/t/pre-proposal-transformation-spe-ii/3062#p-7111-what-is-the-transformation-spe-3) to fix bugs, add tests, and enhance security.

**Tracked By:**  
_Link to the project, board, or view tracking this roadmap item._  
Example: https://github.com/orgs/livepeer/projects/6/views/1

---

**Additional Context (optional):**  
_Add relevant background, dependencies, or related discussions._
